# BCV Today

> Official Banco Central de Venezuela exchange rates made available as a static website and JSON API.

BCV Today publishes the official Banco Central de Venezuela rates for USD, EUR, CNY, TRY and RUB against the Venezuelan bolivar. The site is unofficial and uses public BCV data.

## Agent entry points

- API documentation: https://bcv.today/api/
- OpenAPI description: https://bcv.today/openapi.json
- API catalog: https://bcv.today/.well-known/api-catalog
- API status: https://bcv.today/api/v1/status.json
- Agent card: https://bcv.today/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Agent Skills: https://bcv.today/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- Latest rate: https://bcv.today/api/v1/rate.json
- History index: https://bcv.today/api/v1/history.json
- Sitemap: https://bcv.today/sitemap.xml
- Full agent context: https://bcv.today/llms-full.txt

## API endpoints

- `GET /api/v1/rate.json` returns the latest current rate entry.
- `GET /api/v1/history.json` returns up to the latest 1830 daily entries.
- `GET /api/v1/history/{YYYY-MM-DD}.json` returns one calendar-day snapshot.
- `GET /api/v1/status.json` returns freshness, effective date and supported currency status.

## Notes for agents

- No authentication is required.
- Do not attempt OAuth/OIDC discovery or token exchange; all API endpoints are public static JSON.
- Responses are static JSON files served from GitHub Pages.
- Dates are ISO 8601 strings.
- `effective_date` is the official BCV validity date.
- `updated_at` is the UTC capture timestamp.
- Older historical entries may omit currencies that were unavailable in the source data; currency fields are numeric when present.
- On weekends and holidays, `effective_date` may point to the previous business day whose rate remains in effect.
- This project is not affiliated with Banco Central de Venezuela.
